# Test: Basic E2E Infrastructure Validation
# This test validates that the E2E infrastructure (k3d + Gitea) is working correctly.
#
# Prerequisites: k3d and Gitea running (handled by TestE2E)
# Environment: GITEA_URL, GITEA_TOKEN, E2E_CLUSTER are injected by test runner

# Verify environment variables are set
env GITEA_URL
env GITEA_TOKEN
env E2E_CLUSTER

# Echo the environment for debugging
exec echo 'Gitea URL: '$GITEA_URL
stdout 'Gitea URL:'

exec echo 'Cluster: '$E2E_CLUSTER
stdout 'Cluster:'

# Test basic repository initialization
exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=basic-test --skip-git --non-interactive
exists buf.yaml
exists catalog/Dockerfile
exec grep 'testorg' catalog/Dockerfile

# Test git is available
exec git --version
stdout 'git version'

# Success: Basic infrastructure is working
